name: ConsiderType
summary: Possible options for how a smart symbol (macro) placed in a room with finishing surfaces is displayed in animation and in sections

enum_values.name: eConsiderAutomatic
enum_values.summary: Automatic to nearest (floor or ceiling) surface - !!! don't use this value at the moment, it's only for internal usage

enum_values.name: eConsiderCeilingSurface
enum_values.summary: Adapts to the height of the ceiling in animation and sections.

enum_values.name: eConsiderFloorSurface
enum_values.summary: Adapts to the height of the floor
